response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development with a strong background in C++ (though primarily in embedded and real-time systems) and other languages like D, Java, and JavaScript. However, his recent roles have focused heavily on Node.js and TypeScript, with limited direct C++ work in the past 5 years. His lack of explicit mention of C++ STL, multi-threading, secure development lifecycle (SDL), or IEC 62443 standards raises concerns about alignment with the industrial automation and cybersecurity focus of the role. His experience in IoT and distributed systems is promising but not directly tied to the industrial automation domain.
strengths: Strong background in C++ and embedded systems from earlier roles (e.g., National Instruments)
Experience with high-performance, real-time systems and low-latency applications (e.g., Dunnhumby)
Proven expertise in multi-language development and cross-functional collaboration, demonstrating adaptability
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant C++ role was in 2015; primary focus shifted to Node.js/TypeScript)
No explicit mention of STL, multi-threading, or cloud platform solutions in recent work
Lacks direct experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or secure development lifecycle (SDL)
